<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    print("id=%d color=%s pixels=%d" % (n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels']))

blue = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
for b in blue:
    print("Blue: id=%d boundary=%s" % (b['id'], b['boundary']))

# Check last transition for UP
if last_transition:
    print("UP action changed board: %s" % last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
